action_set_definitions.name: list_locations
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a list of all physical and logical storage locations, including display zones and warehouses.

action_set_definitions.name: get_items_in_location
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all items currently assigned to a specific location with their basic attributes.

location_id.description: The unique ID of the location to query.

action_set_definitions.name: get_sync_report
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the synchronization status across all sales channels for a specific item.

sku_id.description: The SKU ID of the item to check.

action_set_definitions.name: get_inventory_details
action_set_definitions.description: Provides detailed stock counts for a SKU, including physical on-hand amounts at specific locations and pending incoming transfers.

action_set_definitions.name: resolve_channel_sync
action_set_definitions.description: Forces a synchronization update for a specific item on a specific channel to resolve delays or discrepancies.

action_set_definitions.name: initiate_stock_transfer
action_set_definitions.description: Creates a request to move inventory from one location to another.

state_description.inventory_levels: A mapping of SKU IDs to their current stock count and warehouse location.
state_description.channel_sync_status: Current synchronization status for various sales channels (e.g., Online Store, POS, Marketplace).
state_description.pending_transfers: A list of stock transfers currently in transit between locations.
state_description.last_sync_timestamp: The ISO 8601 timestamp of the last global inventory reconciliation.
